root.name: change_slide_layout_and_rearrange_content
root.description: Evaluates if slide 14 layout was changed to 'Three Content', content rearranged into three columns, and a new comparison column added.

children.name: slide_layout_changed
children.description: Checks if slide 14's layout is set to 'Three Content'.

children.name: slide_content_rearranged_into_three_columns
children.description: Checks if slide 14's content is arranged into three columns in the screenshot.

children.name: new_comparison_column_added
children.description: Checks if a new column was added comparing unilateral and bilateral differences.

metadata.task: Change the slide layout to "Three Content" and apply it to  slide 14, rearranging content into a three-column comparison format, adding a new column that calls out the difference between unilateral and bilateral
